notes: Bound-booklet export (v0.3-booklet.md): turn a series into a home-bindable A5-on-A4 booklet. Big multi-turn feature; Task 3 (imposed render) + Task 4 (webfont) need an author physical-printer check (gated).

chunks.notes: DONE. TDD: tools/test-booklet.js (exact assertions, test-manifest idiom) FAIL -> js/booklet.js pure impose()/sequential() -> PASS. impose(8)=[{front:[8,1],back:[2,7]},{front:[6,3],back:[4,5]}]; impose(6) pads to 8 with nulls. Verify: node tools/test-booklet.js; all suites green. Idempotent: js/booklet.js exists with impose in api.

DONE. Registry 'Bind into a booklet' selection (letters with text only; textless disabled+reason), date order + up/down reorder (keyboard), compose logical pages (title / per-letter facts+letter / plates / colophon), paginate by measuring against the A5 content box. Verify: node --check; browser. BIG.

DONE. printBooklet(model, rows, opts) in js/print.js: title/facts/letter(paginated)/plates/colophon/bind leaves, sequential two-up on A4 landscape (@page booklet in print.css), blank-leaf padding for odd totals. bk-print button wired in landing.js. Root-caused+fixed a real bug: pagination probe had no intrinsic size outside the .booklet-sheet flex context (maxH≈0, 3000+ leaf fragmentation) — pinned probe to 148.5mm x 210mm. Also fixed on-screen preview clipping (aspect-ratio card + fixed-pt fonts) by switching to auto-height like .sheet. Verified in-browser: 3-letter compose (9/16 leaves, byte-exact 7-leaf letter reconstruction), blank-padding path (7->8 leaves via direct TesseraPrint.printBooklet calls), no console errors, 375px no overflow. Gate 1 green. Idempotent: TesseraPrint.printBooklet in api; signature mode not yet implemented so re-running is safe.

SIGNATURE mode: impose() ordering (js/booklet.js, already fixture-tested), front/back page positioning left/right per the arrays, likely a mode toggle in the bk-preview UI (currently sequential-only, no picker). Duplex insets (±3mm, update from PROGRESS physical notes), single-signature (<=5 sheets) guidance in the UI, pamphlet-stitch SVG (sequential's bind leaf already has its own simpler cut-and-staple instructions, done). Verify impose-driven page order in DOM. Physical duplex fold-check = AUTHOR GATE.

/qa PDF both modes + browser; PROGRESS/plan/vault docs (first PROGRESS.md touch for this feature — b1-b3a didn't touch it, matching precedent). Physical duplex fold-check is author-gated. Task 4 (webfont decision) is author-gated on print evidence — deferred, noted.

resume_hint: Start b3b-signature: add impose()-driven duplex mode to printBooklet (js/print.js) alongside the working sequential mode, plus a mode toggle in the bk-preview UI. Then b4-qa. Task 3 physical fold-check + Task 4 webfont are author-gated. Token three-way-break decision resolved (Option B, done in 037ab5f).
